text:
On Wed, 14 Mar 2001 21:44:54 +0900, Jun Kuriyama <kuriyama@imgsrc.co.jp> said:

    > I think kernel module should sync with kernel. I'm afraid you
    > did not update vmware2 and rtc ports after new kernel
    > installation.

Ah, but I did. Several times, just to be sure, because that's what I
suspected first.

    > Can you check clean environment?

What precisely would you like me to check?
